disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Live crawling insects and firmly-cemented eggs on the hair shafts (behind ears/nape)
trigger_question_examples: Can you see live crawling insects, and eggs stuck firmly to the hairs?
Are the white specks cemented to the hair (not flaking off)?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I can see live lice moving and white eggs stuck tight to the hairs behind her ears and at the neck.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Scratched areas with golden crusting (early secondary bacterial infection screen)
trigger_question_examples: Are the scratches developing golden crusts, or getting hot, red and swollen?
Any pus or spreading redness on the scalp/neck?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's some yellowish crust on the worst scratches, but they're not hot or swollen and no pus.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, no spreading hot redness down the neck (systemic/deep-infection screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any fever, or redness spreading down the neck with swelling?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever, and the redness isn't spreading down her neck.
